form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 3rd in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1012m, on rain affected going; 2.25 len behind Paris Winds carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last start 6th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 2 len behind Benriach with 59kg at $2.10. Sets up well and can win.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 8 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, nose behind Fiveminutewarning carrying 59kg at $2.50. Won't need to improve much to be winning.

form.formComment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, 3rd of 10 at Echuca 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Baganov carrying 58kg at $3.10. Second-up second last of 7 at Sandown-Lakeside 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Santana carrying 58kg at $7. Can improve again and take beating.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1200m, 23 len behind Chowdown carrying 57.5kg at $151. Will need to improve sharply on recent form.

The race before that led but faded 3rd of 8 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on February 10 over 1118m, 2 len behind Vega Blues carrying 57.5kg at $5. Looking elsewhere.
